name: PER_DISABILITIES_F
description: Store disability information for a person.

columns.Name: DISABILITY_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation code derived from Legal Entity.

columns.Name: SELF_DISCLOSED_TYPE
columns.Comments: Self Disclosed Disability

columns.Name: DISCLOSURE_DATE
columns.Comments: Disability Disclosure Date

columns.Name: ACCOMMODATION_REQUEST
columns.Comments: Accommodation Request

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_WORK_INCIDENTS.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F

columns.Name: REGISTRATION_ID
columns.Comments: ID given to person following registration with disability organization.

columns.Name: REGISTRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of registration with organization for the disabled.

columns.Name: REGISTRATION_EXP_DATE
columns.Comments: Expiry date of registration with organization for the disabled.

columns.Name: ASSESSMENT_DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Obsolete

columns.Name: CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Person Disability Category Name, derived from DISABILITY_CATEGORY lookup.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Person Disability description text

columns.Name: DEGREE
columns.Comments: Person Disability degree

columns.Name: QUOTA_FTE
columns.Comments: Person Disability Quota FTE value

columns.Name: REASON
columns.Comments: Person Disability Reason name, derived from DISABILITY_REASON lookup.

columns.Name: PRE_REGISTRATION_JOB
columns.Comments: Obsolete

columns.Name: WORK_RESTRICTION
columns.Comments: Person Disability work restriction details

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Denotes the status for the person's disability like Temporary.
